title: FERTICOOP-GO-Innovaciones para adaptarse a las mejoras técnicas disponibles (MTD’s) en el sector agrario cooperativo catalán
description: A final results factsheet presenting innovative tools and methodologies for enhanced livestock manure management and agronomic fertilization within Catalan agricultural cooperatives. The project aims to reduce greenhouse gas and ammonia emissions, optimize phosphorus use, and deploy digital platforms for sustainable fertilization recommendations.
